entry.title: Re: How to capture the Network logs during a PunchOut session to view the data sent by the Supplier.
entry.content: Thanks for the informative sharing!

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content: Genau das wollte ich damit sagen: Ich komme bei meiner Auswertung auf 4 Developer, während SAP von 9 Developer-Lizenzen ausgeht. Ich bin mir außerdem nicht sicher, welche Profile oder Berechtigungsobjekte genau zur Einstufung als Developer führen. Ich habe bereits einen Benutzervergleich durchgeführt und festgestellt, dass bei den 4 betreffenden Usern sowohl das Profil SAP_ALL als auch das Berechtigungsobjekt S_A.DEVELOP vorhanden ist. Wenn ich allerdings eine gezielte Suche mit komplexeren Kriterien durchführe – z. B. in der Tabelle UST04 mit dem Suchparameter Profil: S_A.DEVELOP – dann erhalte ich nur einen einzigen Benutzer als Ergebnis. Laut der SAP-Lizenzvermessung haben wir jedoch 9 Developer im System. Daher bin ich etwas unsicher, wie genau diese Einstufung zustande kommt.

entry.title: Re: Migrating to Crystal 64-bit questions
entry.content: OK. Sorry. No need for the Xerces stuff. It is just that that control implements an XML lookup. So forget everything I said about that. On this development machine with the 64 bit runtime, the DLLs are at C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0\win64_x64 and win32_86. Is the built-in editor for Visual Studio 32 or 64 bits? Ie do I need to have both 32 and 64 bit versions of the DLL even if the app is 64 bits? Once I get the project sorted, then I will try opening it in VS2022 and then send it to you.

entry.title: Fiori Elements - How to detect navigation and read routing parameters in a custom page (controller)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing a Fiori Elements app using UI5 version 1.120.x. The app includes a ListReport and an ObjectPage. I've now added a third view using a custom page based on the Flexible Programming Model. The new view is called Employee, and its controller extends from sap/fe/core/PageController.

I’m trying to figure out two things:

  1. How can I detect when the navigation to this custom page has occurred?

  2. How can I read optional routing parameters that might have been passed during navigation?

I noticed that when using a Controller Extension, it's possible to override certain lifecycle methods like onBeforeBinding or onAfterBinding, as shown here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/controllerExtensions/routingExtensibility

However, this approach doesn’t seem to work for view controllers that inherit directly from sap/fe/core/PageController. Is there an equivalent or recommended way to hook into the navigation lifecycle for such custom pages?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: When testing PunchOut Catalogue, items are not being Added to Cart?
entry.content:
Hi @ProMatt ,

Sorry for the late response, did you get the chance to solve the issue?

I was asking the issue occurs in WooCommece or SAP Ariba side, if the issue happens in SAP Ariba, then the cxml payload sent from WooCommece need to be checked.

If the issue happened in WooCommerce, I would suggest to check with WooCommerce support team first, maybe they can find some log from backend to analyze further.

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Re: Standalone As-Built Configuration in SAP ME - Excess...
entry.content:
Hi!

You can activate BusinessServiceExecutionInterceptor log (see Note 3082957) to find out if the GUI of As-Built Config calls any PAPI on Remove action. If no PAPI is called (so it is the old code not using PAPI), then you can submit a request to MFG-ME-API component so that Support team can consider possibility of implementing a missing feature.

You can also try the same but with As-Built Config Tabular, which might be different from the standard (legacy, non-tabular) activity that you are using on the screenshot.

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hi,

if I have understood correctly, support for sap bw 7.5 on hana will still end at the end of 2030, even though you migrate from sap bw to sap bw PCE and then to BDC?

entry.title: Re: Status update in S4 HANA not happening during Enginee...
entry.content:
Hi!

 

I guess Engineering orders are not supported for integration out of the box. Please check the SAPMEINT How-To Guide and the online help, available at help.sap.com/me. If they do not state explicitly that it is supported, then it implies the opposite.

 

Regards,

Sergiy

entry.title: Re: OAuth request is failing in CPI using standard integr...
entry.content: From the attached screenshot it's not clear what type of Authorization you used. Please check this help page: Testing a Connection from SAP Commerce Cloud to SCI using an OAuth Token. As you can see first you need to do a POST request to obtain Bearer token and then use it in GET request with X-CSRF-Token set to Fetch in order to obtain CSRF token. After that both Bearer and CSRF can be used to do the POST request.

entry.title: Re: Download Material Document xml
entry.content:
Hi,

please check this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3120595/E

Best regards, Łukasz

entry.title: Re: Adding parameters to FLP URL for all users client-wide
entry.content: did you google fiori launchpad configuration?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for April – SAP Build 👷‍♀️🏠
entry.content: I finally completed it.

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content: I saw that in the documentation but it was unclear how to implement it using ABAP cds annotations. I think that 'editActionIsEnabled' refers to a xml property defined as Edm.Boolean. (https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/blob/a5a6a14936119a90905d73d4dfacbf8672d09e93/packages/odata-service-inquirer/test/unit/prompts/test-data/metadataV4WithAggregateTransforms.xml#L701). I created this post to hopefully get a solution that works as a ABAP CDS annotation. If it requires js or xml based development that will be done in BAS / outside of our ABAP system so be it. Hopefully as RAP and clean core add-ons become more popular more functionality becomes available through ABAP cds annotations.

entry.title: Re: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content: deleted.

entry.title: Re: Global Feature Contron in RAP, Feature control in RAP

entry.title: Parallel Line As The Next Evolution of Our Public Cloud ERP Product Journey
entry.content:
From Steady Growth to Exponential Success: Parallel Line As The Next Evolution of Our Public Cloud ERP Product Journey 

When we first launched our product in 2017, we set out with the goal of providing a solution that would evolve alongside the needs of our users. Over the years, we witnessed steady, linear growth that reflected our commitment to consistency and quality and a growing business scope. As we moved through the years, customers reflected their demand to evolve, adapt, and think beyond just incremental functional increases. When we embarked onto a new chapter particularly in 2021 and providing to the market starting in 2022, we experienced a pivotal growth spurt that marked a major turning point in our journey. And now, in 2025, we’re excited to introduce another innovation that has the potential to kick it up a notch – the Parallel Line concept – which we believe will be a key to unlocking even more significant flexibility to our customers in the years to come. 

 

A Foundation of Steady Growth

When we first started our journey in 2017, we built our product with a vision of steady, reliable growth. We focused on creating a product that was solid, dependable, and offered clear value to our users for the most essential business processes. As we learned from the feedback of early adopters and refined our offerings, our growth remained steady but linear, reflecting the methodical way we were scaling. This steady pace allowed us to establish a strong base of users, build a team that was focused on innovation, and create a culture that emphasized excellence in every detail.

While the growth was certainly positive, it was clear that our customers will need more than SaaS delivered features. It was obvious that continuously adding capabilities could only take us so far. We needed to fire our next salvo of innovation.

 

2022: A Milestone in Our Growth Trajectory

The year 2022 marked a significant turning point in our growth trajectory. We saw the results of strategic decisions we had been planning for some time, and the introduction of key innovations sparked the growth that would lay the ground for the next level.

One of the most important milestones was the introduction of a 3-system landscape. This new system architecture allowed us to enhance the scalability and flexibility for our customers, making it more adaptable to the evolving needs of our users. This shift was more than just a technical upgrade; it represented a transformation in the way our customers could approach own developments, deployment, and expansion. The 3-system landscape allowed our customers to better meet the needs of a growing user base and last-mile-individualization demand.

Alongside this, we also rolled out extended and new extensibility concepts that gave our users, but more importantly our partners more ways to customize and expand the product. By providing greater flexibility and empowering customers to tailor the product to their specific needs, we unlocked a new level of engagement and adoption. With these innovations, growth surged. We observed an increase in new companies joining the community, and existing customers deepened their commitment to the product. But we knew this was just the beginning.

 

Introducing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Parallel Line (PL)

Now, in Q2 2025, we’re thrilled to unveil our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Parallel Line (PL) concept — an entirely new approach to how our customers and partners can manage projects and drive innovation.

PL is not just another feature; it represents a major leap forward in how customers can operate, collaborate, and scale. It’s a new way of thinking about simultaneous project development and allows to manage exploration of new features and production line in parallel without compromising quality or focus.

The PL concept is designed to further increase the addressable market for SaaS ERP and allows customers to handle the increasing complexity of scaling in today’s fast-paced market. By enabling customers to run projects in parallel in an encapsulated tenant, we give flexibility to better address the diverse needs of our customers and help them rapidly respond to new opportunities as they arise.

The Parallel Line is available for 3-system landscape customers and included in their subscription.

The Main line is used for the initial implementation and daily operations to define scope, set up the organizational structure, configure and test business processes and use them productively.

The Parallel line was intensively discussed and tested with selected customers during the Early Adoption phase, and 2 main use cases turned out to be most relevant for our customers:

  1. Make business configuration enhancements and test them safely in a separate environment. The workspace is copied, including all configuration. Once enhancements are completed, they can be merged back into the main line, e.g. for a rollout of new countries/regions or other larger business configuration enhancements.
  2. Leverage the project line as kind of a sandbox system, e.g. to test run data migrations.

 

Customers can initiate a parallel line provisioning via SAP4Me through the 'Branch' step (1). Branch is a function that is used to set up the parallel line and replicate the existing configuration of the main line to the parallel line. ‘Rebase’ (2) is a function that is used to send any configurations created in the main line to the parallel line after branch. To complete the cycle, ‘Merge’ (3) is a function that is used to send any business configuration changes from the parallel line to the main line into production, once ready.

For those eager to delve into more details, the Digital Library (accessible with any S-user) and Notes 3580675 and 3542536 provide comprehensive overviews of the parallel line.

This is an update on how far we’ve come. PL is designed to be the next catalyst for growth – allowing our customers to expand, scale, and innovate more rapidly than ever before.

 

Wrap Up

With the introduction of Parallel Line and the continued evolution of our 3-system landscape and extensibility features, we are poised for even more significant growth. But we aren’t just focused on scaling – we’re focused on ensuring that each innovation we introduce aligns with our core values of quality, reliability, and customer empowerment.

We are committed to continuing our journey with the same passion and drive that got us here in the first place. The road ahead is full of opportunities, and with the Parallel Line, we’re more equipped than ever to navigate it.

 

Final Thoughts

What started as a steady, linear growth trajectory has transformed into something far more dynamic and exciting. The innovations we’ve introduced over the past few years – from the 3-system landscape to extensibility concepts and now PL – have not only fueled our product’s growth but have also positioned us to lead in an increasingly competitive market. With PL, we are now ready to enter a new era of growth and innovation.

For those eager to read more, the following “How-To” Practitioner blogs have been released.

Parallel Line Branch via SAP for ME

Introduction to the Parallel Line - SAP Community

And further details can be found here: Set Up Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Thanks for tuning in, looking forward to your thoughts

Bert

entry.title: Re: No direct postings possible to G/L account XXXXX we a...
entry.content: If functionals (and auditors) are ok, you could remove the flag, you also need to prevent other users from posting between unset and set of the flag.

entry.title: Remove skip and top query parameter from request url
entry.content: Hi, my backend is Java cap services. I'm using oData to call them from SAP UI5. By default in each call, skip and top query parameters are getting added. The service is exposed as a function import. It doesn't have an entity set so how to remove this skip and top parameter from request url as I'm getting error :  Failed to get contexts for getDetails() with start index 0 and length 100 - The system query option '$skip' is not allowed.

entry.title: Re: EWM: Planned replenishment with layout-orientated war...
entry.content: It looks as if you have set an HU type check for your target storage type here, which is already checked when picking from the Y500 is executed. If you deactivate the check, the warehouse tasks should be created. In my opinion, this is an error in the SAP standard. The HU type check should only be carried out after picking from the pick point to the target storage type. When picking from the pick point, a repacking into a pick HU is carried out and this could again be an HU-TYP which is permitted at the target storage type. You should definitly check this with SAP.

entry.title: Error when using Background Processing Framework in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello,

i want ta execute some logic through Background Processing Framework in SAP RAP event or action. It is on public cloud. My code:

 

DATA lo_project TYPE REF TO z_test_bgpf.

DATA lo_process TYPE REF TO if_bgmc_process_single_op.

DATA lx_bgmc TYPE REF TO cx_bgmc.

 

TRY.

lo_project = NEW #( iv_batchKey = is_project-batchKey ).

 

lo_process = cl_bgmc_process_factory=>get_default( )->create( ).

 

* lo_process->set_name( 'bgPF Demo' )->set_operation( lo_project ).

lo_process->set_operation_tx_uncontrolled( lo_project ).

lo_process->save_for_execution( ).

 

CATCH cx_bgmc INTO lx_bgmc.

ENDTRY.

 

I receiving ABAP dump on this line: lo_process->save_for_execution( ).

 

Short Text Statement "CALL " is not allowed with this status.
Runtime Error BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STMT_IN_CALL

how can i solve this?

entry.title: Re: Unable to Clear Multiple Documents at Once in FB05
entry.content: FB05 can clear multiple documents only if all matching criteria (like amount, assignment field, and clearing reason) are fully aligned; otherwise, it processes partial clearing or fails, even if OB74 settings seem correct.

entry.title: Re: Can any one help with function "Get Job Info String F...
entry.content: Thanks for your response Kayla. I could see the Recalculation settings in place, but still recalculation is not happening.

entry.title: Re: Brazil - Alphanumerical CNPJ
entry.content: Notes: such as 3588642 - BR_Alphanumeric CNPJ references for SAP Business One

entry.title: Webinar: Standard Audit File-Tax (SAF-T) - Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK) with SAP
entry.content:
Are you interested in learning about Poland's Standard Audit File-Tax regulations?

Join us for an online session focused on mastering Poland's SAF-T regulations using SAP technology. In this exclusive webinar, you will gain key insights into the legal landscape of SAF-T in Poland and receive guidance on transitioning from the SAP SAF-T Add-on for Polish Regulatory Requirements to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

Webinar Highlights:

  • Legal Insights: Understand the fundamental principles and legal background of SAF-T in Poland.
  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Explore how this advanced solution can simplify and streamline your SAF-T reporting processes.
  • Transition Strategies: Receive expert recommendations on preparing for and executing a seamless transition to SAP Document and Reporting Compliance.

The session will be held in English. You can find more information about the webinar and speakers here.

Don't miss out! Register now to secure your spot in the session.

If you want to get more information about the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in Poland provided by SAP experts, join the Poland - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA BP field enhancement
entry.content: If the custom fields are visible but not saving, it's likely the BDT event handling or field group configuration is incomplete, and the system doesn't recognize the data as changed.

entry.title: Re: Vendor batch (LICHN) update in inbound delivery using WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2
entry.content: working fine now

entry.title: Re: Error P301 No entry in table T528 for S 500XXXXX
entry.content: The error occurs because table T528B, not just T528, is missing the necessary entry for the position; so please ensure the position is properly maintained in T528B with valid infotype settings and relationships.

entry.title: Re: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content:
SAP doesn’t explicitly define what constitutes a "developer," but based on the report, it appears that the presence of the S_DEVELOP authorization and involvement with development objects in transports are key indicators.

If a user has activity types 01 (Create) or 02 (Change) in the S_DEVELOP authorization object, SAP likely considers them a developer. Additionally, users who have transported certain object types are also flagged, including:

  • SFPI

  • METH

  • PROG

  • SFPF

  • CLSD

  • CPRI

  • CPRO

  • CPUB

  • MESS

  • CLAS

  • TABL

  • DDLX

  • DOMA

  • DTEL

  • ENHO

  • APIS

A good rule of thumb is to review who has S_DEVELOP with ACTVT 01 or 02 and ensure that only actual developers have this level of access. You might find that adjusting this helps align your developer count more closely with the report.

Also, keep in mind: if a user has created or modified an object and included it in a transport during the relevant period, SAP will treat them as a developer—because they’ve performed a development task. That’s likely where the discrepancy in your numbers is coming from.

entry.title: Re: Replacement functionality for "Incompletion procedure...
entry.content: As I know the the classic Foreign Trade functionality is obsolete, and incompletion checks for such data must be handled via SD incompletion procedures or embedded GTS; there is no direct replacement for EIUV, but logs can be tracked via GTS or custom solutions.

entry.title: Re: Issue when performing reversal via Fiori Apps Supplie...
entry.content: The error occurs because Fiori App checks the reference field for duplicates, unlike MR8M; invoices with a reference number may need to be reversed using MR8M unless the Fiori app logic is adjusted.

entry.title: Re: Decimal place in a calculated field in SAC
entry.content: Ok If you have both measures and Accounts in your model, do check what is the structure priority in Model preferences. Structure priority decides whether formatting of Measure or formatting of accounts will take precedence.

entry.title: Re: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap...
entry.content: scrollbar comes automatically, you don't need to to anything.

entry.title: Re: Browser Cache Logon Issue
entry.content: The issue looks to be caused by browser cache and Azure SSO session persistence across clients; so to resolve it long-term, may configure SSO with client-specific logon parameters or use different subdomains per client to isolate sessions.

entry.title: Re: EWM: Planned replenishment with layout-orientated war...
entry.content:
Hi mario9075 - Error reason is marked below

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: dynamic selection disabled in VA05
entry.content: The dynamic selection in VA05 is controlled by program logic as I know, not just user parameters; it's disabled for certain output types or variants, so enabling it may require a custom variant or SAP note implementation.

entry.title: Re: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap...
entry.content:
@junwuThanks for the reply. In my case i don't see the horizontal scroll bar and columns are getting wrapped.

I tried using tabletype="Table" but still same issue

entry.title: Pull messages from Solace Queue using the AEM adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Pull messages from Solace Queue using the AEM adapter in CPI

 

  1. Configure the AEM adapter with the details from service created in cluster manager of Solace

Provide the config details from above snapshot & maintain them on AEM channel config

Create the password as secure parameter in Security Material

We are trying to consume messages from the queue created

The testing is successful. After deploying the artifact, the messages are consumed from the queue

Regards,
Rohini Potham

entry.title: Re: SUM prerequisite Extended check is stuck at phase CON...
entry.content: It’s likely due to unresolved addon/component conflicts or corrupt stack XML; regenerate the stack file in Maintenance Planner, recheck addon compatibility, and ensure latest SUM version is used.

entry.title: How to Upload Project Budget in Company Code Currency?
entry.content:
How to upload Project Budget in the company code currency?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Upload Project Budget in Company Code Currency?
entry.content:
To Upload project budget in company code currency, make use of the below respective fields : 

Amounts and Currencies  HSL  AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency

Refer to the below SAP HELP documentation for the same

Fields for Financial Plan Data Import

How to Import Financial Plan data 

Currencies

entry.title: How can I find the source field of a target field in S4Hana cloud?
entry.content:
In the billing document Header Detail, under Taxes, I have a field called "VAT Registration No.". I need to know what the source field of this field is and which business partner role it comes from (Payer, BillTo, ShipTo). 

The general question of how to find the source field of a target field frequently comes up in other situations, too.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Flowgraphs: What SQL Statements are executed?
entry.content: To see the SQL statements executed by a HANA Flowgraph, you can enable SQL trace (ST05 or PlanViz) or use Performance Analysis in the Web IDE; this lets you capture and analyze the generated SQL with minimal effort.

entry.title: Steps to push messages from Postman to Solace - SAP CPI scenarios
entry.content:
Create a demo trial account for solace pub sub

Navigate to Cluster Manager & create a service

Open the service & click on connect tab as shown below

The below library shows the host & connection details to connect to the service

 

Create a queue & topic on event broker

Create a topic subscription as below

Go to Postman & use the URL, credentials to hit to the topic end point “rohini”

 

Navigate to the queue & check the messages have successfully pushed from postman to solace queue

 

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@antonellastella it is great to meet you in the community. May I ask where you are from and your areas of interest? I live in the US outside of Philadelphia. My role is in the SAP Community. 

 

Be sure to join the many Interest Groups | SAP Community

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: How to change the tax classification for professional service orders using BAdI “Sales Item Tax
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Good day!
Thank you for the detailed step by step guide. Its really helpful when comes to adding custom fields.

Adding to this , I have a query on custom field. Lets say,

  1. We need 1 Extra column in Billing Plan level. So that we can post some  Text over there. the Same Can be printed in Invoice Print form.
  2. for example if i have 10 billing plans in 1 SO then i can enter Description for 10 Billing Plans. 
  3. If i Release 2 Billing Plans for one Invoice those description should flow to Billing Document. 
  4. The Description of Billing Plan we can use in Printout level.

Thank you for the help in advance.
Regards,
Ashish Kumar Patra

entry.title: Re: Business Volume calculation in Condition Contract Man...
entry.content:
In WB2R_BUSVOL, select Output Level Business Volume as Single Record and check the Invoice documents used to arrive the values then you may get the details. 

If multiple invoice documents are posted for the contract validity period then the values will be posted against the contract number

entry.title: Re: Brazil - Alphanumerical CNPJ
entry.content: yes, saw this one, but nothing about S4HANA yet

entry.title: Re: How can I find the source field of a target field in S4Hana cloud?
entry.content: To find the source of the "VAT Registration No." in the billing document header (Taxes) in SAP, first use F1 help on the field to identify the underlying table and field name. Then, check the Business Partner master data (transaction BP) for the Payer and Bill-to Party roles, specifically under the "Tax Numbers" tab, as the VAT number likely originates from one of these. If not found, explore the tax configuration in SPRO. The field is usually linked to the VAT registration number maintained in the relevant business partner's master data.

entry.title: Issue on Label Printing: the character 'O' (letter o) looks like a '0' (zero)
entry.content: We have a problem with a certain label used for storage units. Whenever it is printed, the character 'O' (letter o) looks like a '0' (zero). It seems like a font issue used with the label template. The label is in IPL language printing on Intermec printers. Would you be able to provide troubleshooting steps for both label template generated in SAP Script and Smartforms?

entry.title: Re: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap...
entry.content: where you set the table type? if it is in manifest, it should be GridTable

entry.title: Re: Catalogue activation pre requisits and ANID
entry.content:
Hi @satyaprakaash,

Thanks much for your reply on this, 

So, ANID on SLP is not having any effect in Catalogue Enablement per my understanding, not for External Static nor for PunchOut, is this statement correct?

Cheers,

entry.title: Re: Issue in Storage Location Determination in SAP ECC PP...
entry.content:
Hi @dineshudl 

Do you work with (e)WM? Your components are assigned to an operation of the routing. The operation has a work center. The work center has a supply area. The supply area is linked to a storage location.

If you have this setup, the supply area storage location can be determined and used as well.

The determination happens in a logical predefined order of course. More information on it via SAP note 137225. If your behaviour is different, please check user exits, badi's or check with SAP.

https://me.sap.com/notes/137225/E

Hope this helps.

Kind regards,
Jens Koyen

entry.title: Re: Issue in Storage Location Determination in SAP ECC PP...
entry.content: Hi Jens, I don't use any of the setup you mentioned above. If I delete the first Production Version, system determine storage location from second PV. Only if I have multiple PV's, it always goes for first PV Storage Location but other parameter like BOM and routing operation are determined from second PV. Regards, Dinesh Kumar V.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning based on the project starting month and duration of a project.
entry.content: have you found the solution for it?

entry.title: Re: Issue in enabling the Horizontal scrollbar in the Sap...
entry.content: remove vbox, it should be "Table" if you configure it in xml code

entry.title: SAP Dealer Business Management Road map to ECC to S4 Hana migration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know what the steps or guidelines involved are while migrating the system from ECC to S4HANA for SAP SD & DBM (dealer business management). If anyone has any notes for SAP DBM (Dealer Business Management), please share them to my email ID: pavanm5353@gmail.com

 

Regards,

Pavan Kumar M

entry.title: Multiplication of colunm Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello all!!

I'm new and need some heIp. Is there a way to multiply the values of a measure in a data action? For example:

Equip  FDS  TYPE

A        0,97  PARALEL

B        0,66 PARALEL

C      0,88  SERIE

TOTAL = 0,97 * 0,66 * 0,88

I've tried this way but it didn't work

VARIABLEMEMBER #total OF [d/Measures]

DATA([d/Measures] = #total) = 1

 

FOREACH [d/TYPE]

DATA([d/Measures] = #total) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #total  *  RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] ="FDS")

ENDFOR

entry.title: Fixed asset valuation - 0L and 2L ledgers both need to be filled in?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working in the "Manage Fixed Assets" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and I’m a bit confused about the Valuation section of the asset master data. I noticed that there are multiple valuation areas assigned to an asset, linked to different ledgers (for example, 0L and 2L). Here's a screenshot for reference:

My questions are:

Do we need to fill in both ledgers? What happens if we don't?

What is the difference between these ledgers in this context?

Is there a best practice or recommendation for which valuation areas should be maintained, and which ones can be left alone if unused?

Why does Ledger 2L appear multiple times with different depreciation areas (15, 16, 32)?

Any help to better understand how to work with this screen and when/why to fill in each line would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: API/connector between SuccessFactor and Ariba Procure...
entry.content:
Hi @JCVazquez ,

If the SCIM API is not the case, then the ITK tool is the only option which I assume it's the mechanism the customer already used.

To replace Oracle, I would suggest to use BTP Integration Suite, here is an example iflow to integrate Successfactor and ServiceNow, from my POV, it can be adopted to Ariba required csv file (Shared User data) as well.

https://api.sap.com/integrationflow/Replicate_SAP_SuccessFactors_Users_to_ServiceNow_User

Hope it helps.

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: #COE#SW01 Copy data from Business Partner custom field to Company Code level
entry.content:
We have a custom field on the business partner containing the customer dunning email address pushed through an api from an external application. Later we will add company codes to the business partner.

How can we automatically sync the data from the custom field on the business partner level to the clerks internet address field on company code level without repushing the data through the interface each time a new company code is added?

entry.title: Re: Timesheet Approval BADI SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud Edition

entry.title: Re: Please provide details how to create Purchase info re...
entry.content:
Automating Purchase Orders: Step-by-Step Configuration Guide

Automating purchase orders (PO) is a game-changer for streamlining procurement processes. By enabling seamless integration between systems and minimizing manual intervention, businesses can save time, reduce errors, and enhance supplier relationships. This guide covers the essential steps, including configuring ALE data, activating automatic PO in item categories, and maintaining material sources and purchase info records.

With SAP’s powerful tools like VOV7, ME01, and ME11, automating POs ensures efficiency and accuracy, making your procurement processes faster, smarter, and more reliable.

Adding ALE Data for Purchase Order in Sales Organization

Application Link Enabling (ALE) is essential for integrating and transferring data between systems in distributed environments. Configuring ALE for purchase orders ensures seamless communication and automation across the sales organization.

ALE (Application Link Enabling) data for purchase orders. Key fields include the sales organization “TATA,” associated plant, purchasing group (001), supplier (900002), storage location (101A), and movement type (101). The setup enables seamless integration for automated POs by linking the sales organization with the purchasing organization and supplier. Additionally, it includes text formatting fields, statistical currency (INR), and options for rebate processing and standard purchase order type (NB).

Step 1: Activate Automatic PO in Item Category (VOV7)

To enable automation, the Automatic PO setting must be activated in the Item Category. This ensures the system generates POs without manual intervention for specific categories.

  • Steps to configure in VOV7:
    1. Navigate to Transaction Code VOV7.
    2. Locate the relevant item category.
    3. Enable the Automatic PO checkbox.
    4. Save the settings.

Step 2: Enable Automatic PO in Business Partner (BP)

The second step involves configuring the Purchasing View in the Business Partner (BP) master data. This step ensures that vendors or suppliers can process automated purchase orders.

  • Steps:
    1. Open the Business Partner module.
    2. Navigate the Purchasing View tab.
    3. Check the Automatic PO option.
    4. Save the changes.

Step 3: Maintain Material Source (ME01)

Defining the material source is critical to identify the supplier for specific materials. Use Transaction Code ME01 for this step.

  • Steps:
    1. Enter the material and plant information in ME01.
    2. Assign a valid supplier source.
    3. Save the source data.

Step 4: Maintain Purchase Info Record (ME11)

Purchase Info Records provides the system with vendor-specific data, including prices, terms, and conditions.

  • Steps:
    1. Access Transaction Code ME11.
    2. Enter details like material, vendor, and purchasing organization.

  1. Specify pricing and validity periods.
  2. Save the record.

Table Summary of Configurations

Step

Transaction Code

Key Action

Activate Automatic PO

VOV7

Enable Automatic PO in Item Category.

Configure Purchasing

BP

Check Automatic PO in Purchasing View.

Define Material Source

ME01

Assign supplier for materials.

Maintain Info Record

ME11

Record vendor details and pricing.

Benefits of Automating Purchase Orders

  1. Time Savings: Reduce manual work in repetitive tasks.
  2. Improved Accuracy: Minimize errors caused by manual entry.
  3. Streamlined Procurement: Ensure timely and efficient purchasing processes.
  4. Enhanced Supplier Relationships: Fulfill orders promptly with fewer discrepancies.

entry.title: How to lock object with odata?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How can i lock an object with odata.

as an example : user has a list of deliveries in android app, when it clicked to specific delivery he revieves a list of materials in this delivery.
If a user clicked - i don't want to allow changing this delivery in sap using sap t-code's ( vl*).
I tried using 'ENQUEUE_EVVBLKE', but lock dissapears when the user get the result of responce.
I want to save a lock untill the user comeback to previous screen or save changes.
I've read about etag, but as i understood it's more about lock's before saving to db.

In SPRO, I checked 103110, but no values are assigned to the companies, so I guess it isn't here where it's defined. Not sure where it is.

entry.title: Re: When will prices for SQL Anywhere on the SAP Online Store be fixed?
entry.content: Are you looking for the client only?

entry.title: Re: Multiplication of colunm Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@priscilla_barbosa82 

Is there a way to multiply the values of a measure in a data action? -- Yes

What is not clear from your example is where you want to store the result of this multiplication. If you want to store on a equipment member called Total then you have to create the member first. What you have done is use variable members which are not stored and lost after script execution.

So either you can store the result on a new equipment called Total or on a new measure or a new Type. If not then you need to use # for dimensions at least.

Assuming you chose to store it on Measure

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] ="FDS"

MEMBERSET [d/EQIP] =("A","B","C")

DATA([d/Measures] = "Total",[d/EQUIP]="#",[d/Type]="#") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="A",[d/Type]="PARALEL") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="B",[d/Type]="PARALEL") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/EQIP] ="C",[d/Type]="SERIE")

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Decimal place in a calculated field in SAC
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, I found yhe solution , if you create a formula , save and want to change after then you cannot, formatting must be done in the same time

entry.content:

We have done all the set up for Service Instance and Destination but when we upload PDF file using File Uploader we pass below fields.

 

The problem is that the file that is placed in Repository is not opening it is just a file being placed in BTP.

Can someone help?

entry.title: Re: Multiplication of colunm Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
First, thank you for the answer!

I store the result of this multiplication in another measure called FDMS (SERIE) and FDMP (PARALEL). The thing is the number of equipament is undefined.  So i need a multiplication for each type.

DATA([d/Measures] = "FDMS") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #TOTAL)

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Product Release - Deprecation of Canvas Repor...
entry.content:
Hello @lukaszkubiak -

   If you click the link to the blog that is included in that What's New Viewer entry, you'll see the current information.


At present, we've committed to an update in the second half of 2025 to customers around the transition plan and deletion of legacy report tools (Canvas, Table, and now Tiles & Dashboards).  This will then be updated to all customers via direct email notice, this blog will be updated, and the What's New Viewer entry will also be updated.  I hope this addresses your question.

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/retirement-of-canvas-table-tiles-dashboards-and-classic-report-types/ba-p/13619483 

Thanks!
Ben

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Server Error
entry.content: hello,

entry.title: Re: What is the use P type variable in ABAP?
entry.content:
Example: 

DATA result TYPE p LENGTH 14 DECIMALS 14.

In ABAP, a packed number (TYPE p) declared with LENGTH 14 means it occupies 14 bytes. The total number of decimal digits that can be stored is calculated as (2*Length – 1), which here gives 27 digits. With DECIMALS set to 14, the number has 27 – 14 = 13 digits before the decimal point. Therefore, the highest number possible is 9,999,999,999,999.99999999999999.

More on the topic here (ABAP Help).

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit integration suite with internal Server Error
entry.content:
hello, did anyone find the solution? or is it on SAP side problem?
I tried on chrome and edge, clearing cache didnt help

entry.title: How to add one Business Catalog into two Business Roles?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Please help us to know how we can authorize one catalog in two roles.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add one Business Catalog into two Business Roles?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Hope you're doing pretty well! 

In this case, you have two options: 

  1. Manually open each Business Role and include the Business Catalog. You can check the documentation SAP Help Portal | How to edit active Business Roles.

    OR 

  2. Use the mass update functionality. Check the documentation SAP Help Portal | How to Make Mass Changes to Business Roles.

 

Also, we have the "Leading Business Role" and "Derived Business Role" concept, in case you're not familiar.

It is useful if you need to create several business roles with common characteristics. You can define one business leading role and then derive other business roles from it. This leading role contains the basic settings such as access restrictions, the assigned business catalogs and common restrictions, such as General Accountant or General Planner. The values defined in the leading business role can’t be changed in the derived business role. You can, however, define additional values for the derived role. 

Check SAP Help Portal | How to Create Leading and Derived Business Roles for further information.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Use CRUD Opreations with SAP Datasphere Command-Line-Interface
entry.content:
Hey @Yash02 , unfortunately I do not have a sample JSON. The official SAP documentation provides information on creating replication Flows via CLI (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/6f5c65f209004751aa48f9682ee2ec45.html).

BR
Yves
